message:
test(context): add unit tests for context pack builder (pack.go)

Cover pure-logic functions: DefaultBudgetAllocation, cacheKey,
componentTitle, estimateTokens, truncateJSON (array/object/fallback),
truncateText, calculateFilePriority, selectS2PFormat,
intelligentTruncate, optimizeFilesForBudget, renderXML, renderMarkdown,
render routing, generatePackID, and CacheStats/ClearCache.

Raises context package coverage from 46.6% to 54.9%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
